title: erigeron ciliolatus
intro: Erigeron ciliolatus, also known as the Chinese fleabane, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family that is native to China, Japan, and Korea. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, making it beneficial in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Erigeron ciliolatus include reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and alleviating respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
